name: ffi-benchmark
description: Benchmarking FFI call overhead: NAPI-RS (TypeScript → Rust) vs JNI (Java → Rust)

scripts.build:napi: cd native && cargo build --release && cp target/release/libnapi_test.dylib ../native/napi_test.node
scripts.build: npm run build:napi && npm run build:ts && npm run build:jni
scripts.bench: npm run bench:napi && npm run bench:jni
scripts.test:rust: cd native && cargo test && cd ../jni-bench/rust && cargo test
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run build && npm run bench
